_about: A4 gate — occupant-experience (ID/UX) rules. Principles-as-data per designer-v2 A1.2. Each rule carries provenance: who taught it, and industry corroboration.

rules.name: fcu-direct-throw-vs-pillow-clearance
rules.rule: The FCU direct-throw footprint (unit span +200mm each side, extended 2600mm along the throw direction) must not intersect the pillow zone (the 480mm strip of the bed at its head end, full bed width).

provenance.origin: ID contractor verbal advice (identity in private provenance log, outside repo), reference-case aircon discussion 2026-03-18 showroom meeting — not in message archive (checked 2026-07-22)
provenance.verdict: industry-wide installer/manufacturer guidance, not a personal heuristic

rules.name: fcu-not-above-headboard
rules.rule: The FCU must not be mounted on the same wall the bed head touches within 600mm horizontally of the bed span (no unit directly above the headboard).

rules.name: preferred-positions-note
rules.rule: ADVISORY (not gating): preferred spots are perpendicular to the bed or above the bedroom door, mounted 2.1-2.4m high.
